FlavourText.original:
Hyrri loosed a barrage of arrows,
tipped with a poisoned hatred
only oppression can ferment.
FlavourText.zh_cn:
西里的箭雨呼啸而来，
矢锋剧毒命中要害，
留下冰冷遗体诉说悲哀。
FlavourText.zh_tw:
西里射出一道弓箭的彈幕，
箭簇抹上了惡毒的仇恨，
在壓迫的歲月中醞釀而成。

translation.zh_cn: 敌人被[Freeze|冻结]的持续时间提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 增加 {0}% 敵人身上的[Freeze|冰凍]持續時間

group.original: [Evasion Rating|Evasion Rating] is doubled if you have not been [Hit|Hit] [Recently|Recently]

translation.zh_cn: 若你[Recently|近期]没有被[Hit|击中]，[Evasion Rating|闪避值]翻倍
translation.zh_tw: 若你[Recently|近期]未被[Hit|擊中]則[Evasion Rating|閃避值]加倍
